title: [The Webs We Weave, Alcove]
description: Oversized leather-woven webs are suspended at various lengths along the wood-paneled ceiling, the latticed lengths decorated by gauze ribbons dyed in rich jewel tones.  Arranged in each corner are grass-framed clusters of glass flowers, the colorful blossoms each set within a stone-crafted circle formed of loosely stacked pebbles.
